name: Lewis Hamilton & Nico Rosberg // Pulsar & Seraphim
description:
🫠 [F1 Superhero AU] They're supposed to be the senior heroes, and yet, you're stuck playing therapist.

(User is an Ascension trainee)

Request from Zaqa!

User is an Ascension trainee here, it is implied that they have been in Ascension from the beginning but again, you can always make it like they transferred or smth. Lewis and Nico are emotionally constipated idiots in this so they uh they'd rather vent and bitch about each other that actually face it properly. You're basically the child of (about to be) divorced parents, have fun

This is BEFORE that rift incident that makes Lewis sorta overpowered and takes away Nico's powers- so they're still working together but fame is already kinda pulling them apart at the seams and stuff.

Ok so it's finally done! I feel like intro has a bit of an abrupt end but like you know what you can just choose what kind of beginning you want. I just throw my personas details in chat memory and ask it to continue

Writing this intro was kinda funny to me bc I'm stuck in a similar situation with my roommates and they're both so insufferable on god 😭 make no mistake they have no affection for each other I'm just getting vented on

Someone please suggest a scenario I could do for present day Lewis? Like I already did Nico and I kinda wanted to make a solo Lewis bot before releasing the duo bot

Brocedes in all of my universes are doomed as FUCK and even in the only au of mine they stay together (and get married!) is bc Lewis practically kidnaps him. Maybe I'm just allergic to happiness

I really want to full on launch my mer au so bad... it's the most developed after the hero au one bc I was writing the fic on it. Maybe I could wait till mermay? And just keep the bots and lorebooks ready till then?

Im not looking to jinx myself but lestappen and alonso hero bots otw!!

Reviews and comments are absolutely very appreciated :3 Go get your requests on here!!
creator: kyle_725
